title: SniperBot Options Deferral / No-Action Decision Schema
description: Pure, deterministic, immutable, side-effect-free, non-authorizing, non-executing classification of externally supplied options-specific facts. The future evaluator owns first-match precedence and mappings; this schema does not encode procedural conditionals, eligibility, contract selection, market-data access, orchestration, exercise, assignment, orders, execution, or runtime integration.

Outcome.description: Neither outcome represents options eligibility, contract approval, direction, strategy, trade permission, exercise or assignment authority, order instruction, or execution authority.

ReasonCode.description: Closed 22-value options-specific reason vocabulary. No UNKNOWN, stock-specific, or free-text reason is approved.

RequiredAction.description: Full repository vocabulary. FOUNDER_AUTHORITY_REQUIRED and RESET_REQUIRED are vocabulary-only and are not emitted by this subject.

EmittableAction.description: The three actions this subject may emit.

GenericAssetClassContext.description: Optional contextual generic asset-class evidence only. It is non-authorizing, independent, and does not invoke or orchestrate a generic classifier. Only OPTIONS is contextually compatible.

AuthorityEvidence.description: Optional contextual EchoAuth evidence only. EchoAuth remains the sole permission authority; this schema grants no authority and does not call, validate, repair, reinterpret, broaden, or bypass EchoAuth.

options_reference.description: Opaque non-empty options reference only; no underlying ticker, contract parsing, selection, chain, or market-data semantics are represented.

options_evidence_contradictory.description: Only this supplied flag establishes options-evidence contradiction.

options_deferral.description: External descriptive assertion that options-specific review should pause; not permission, exclusion, or execution.

options_no_action.description: External descriptive no-action posture; not approval, eligibility, signal, lifecycle handling, or execution.

options_restricted.description: External descriptive restriction fact only; not calculated, verified, derived, modified, or approved here.

options_excluded.description: External descriptive exclusion fact only; not calculated, verified, derived, modified, or approved here.

options_lane_confirmation.description: Optional; absence is classified by the future evaluator. Confirmation is never inferred from a reference, identifier, or data.

correlation_reference.description: Mandatory opaque caller reference; exact equality with the decision reference is evaluator-owned.

Request.description: Closed request of externally supplied descriptive facts only. It intentionally contains no underlying-stock, ticker, OCC, call/put, strike, expiration, premium, Greeks, volume, open interest, liquidity, market-hours, exercise, assignment, position, signal, strategy, risk, sizing, order, broker, or executable fields.

correlation_reference.description: Must equal the request correlation reference; exact cross-object equality is evaluator-owned. No selection, signal, order, broker, persistence, or execution is represented.

Decision.description: Descriptive output only. The future evaluator owns the exact 20-step first-match order, mappings, undefined classifications, authority precedence, and correlation equality; no procedural output conditionals are encoded here.
